articles.author: Prosper Heri Ngorora, Chinedu Asadu
articles.title: Congo’s Ebola outbreak has killed over 1,000 people - AP News
articles.description: More than 1,000 people have died from the Ebola outbreak in eastern Congo, according to Africa’s top health body, a grim toll in what’s already been declared the fastest Ebola outbreak in history. The latest update from Congo’s Ministry of Health shows that a…
articles.content: BUNIA, Congo (AP) More than 1,000 people have died in the Ebola outbreak in Congo, according to Africas top health body, a grim toll in the fastest Ebola outbreak in history, as conflict, community r… [+5788 chars]
